title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built from Kimi K2.5 with continued coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning that includes auto-install bootstrapping. The training pipeline uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to handle context limits, evaluated against Cursor Bench, an internal benchmark of real engineer queries.
